data.body: Plan-review: PASS (signed). Impl commit 29d9fa863. Triage of 19 advisories: (COH/E1/G6 — the important one) the ticket's literal compose 0.85*0.8=0.68 < 0.70 for a self-revealing hard-override finding defeats 'auto-high'; FIXED by flooring the override LAST (after the amplifier), mirroring impact_code's reversibility_floor — all three mechanisms (MAX/override/amplifier) preserved, AC2 intent met. (G1G2/T8 'verify prompt singular') BOTH plan_review_verifier.md + plan_review_verifier_agentic.md updated. (T1/T8 axis scoring) each axis has a clear none|low|medium|high definition in both the pydantic Field descriptions AND the prompts; hard-override + detection axes flagged. (E5/E6) test_impact_plan.py adds boundary tests + proving cmd; (AC4 'stranded 0.60-0.69 band clears 0.70') covered by a unit test (mean=0.6675 stranded, impact_plan>=0.70) — full-CORPUS replay is #3's calibration harness. (G6/E4/E3 'undecomposed from G5 child') the axis is emitted by the verifier; #4's veto ensures false 'flat' findings don't reach it. (T5e ADR) the per-gate impact_fn seam is documented in docstrings; #6's ADR will record the two-gate impact model. (back-compat) missing axis -> 0, older/absent verifier abstains; kernel 'verification' contract byte-identical (test asserts base model unchanged, plan model is a strict superset).
